title: Kraken Launches Crypto Perps Trading in the US on Kraken Pro
summary: Kraken has launched perpetual futures trading in the US through Kraken Pro, following its acquisition of CFTC-licensed exchange Bitnomial. This move brings regulated, high-leverage crypto trading to American retail and institutional investors.
body:
Kraken, one of the largest crypto exchanges globally, has launched perpetual futures (perps) trading in the United States through its Kraken Pro platform. This development comes after Kraken completed its acquisition of Bitnomial, a fully CFTC-licensed exchange, clearinghouse, and brokerage, in May 2026.

The launch of crypto perps trading in the US is significant because it provides American traders with access to high-leverage crypto derivatives in a regulated environment. Kraken Pro will offer these products under the oversight of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), ensuring compliance with US regulations. Perpetual futures are a type of derivative that allows traders to speculate on the price of crypto assets without an expiration date, often using leverage to amplify potential gains or losses.

This move is particularly important for US-based crypto traders who have had limited options for regulated, high-leverage trading. Previously, many American traders turned to offshore exchanges, which often lack the same level of regulatory protection. With Kraken Pro now offering these products, retail and institutional investors can trade crypto perps with greater confidence in the security and transparency of the platform.

For those interested in getting started, Kraken Pro's perpetual futures trading is now live. Traders should familiarize themselves with the platform's offerings, leverage options, and risk management tools. Keep an eye on Kraken's official announcements for any updates or new product launches related to crypto derivatives trading.
twitterThread: Kraken just launched crypto perps trading in the US on Kraken Pro, following its acquisition of CFTC-licensed Bitnomial. High-leverage crypto derivatives are now available to American traders.
This is a big deal because it brings regulated, high-leverage crypto trading to the US. Kraken Pro offers these products under CFTC oversight, ensuring compliance and security.

If you're in the US and interested in trading crypto perps, Kraken Pro is now live. Check it out and stay tuned for updates. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-15-kraken-launches-crypto-perps-trading-in-the-us-on-kraken-pro
